query: SELECT id, reportType, location, reportDate, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.clientName') as clientName FROM report_submissions WHERE location = 'sales' AND reportType = 'bagel-orders' AND reportDate = '2026-03-10' AND status != 'draft' ORDER BY id DESC;
